name: UBA : Populate Authorized Applications
notes:
Populates the reference set "UBA : Authorized Applications" with the names of applications that are installed while this rule is enabled.

Note: The rule is disabled by default. Enable for a short duration to populate the names while users are installing applications.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified, UBA : Application or Service Installed
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Populate Authorized Applications on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified, UBA : Application or Service Installed
RED_list: Add the "ProgramName" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "UBA : Authorized Applications"
